name: method
value: Use the digitized Shetty/Selig rows to split VRS mean CT loss, measured-envelope half-amplitude, and J/V/vi mapping. Use the timing rows only as low-frequency proxies. The packet does not provide raw time histories, RMS statistics, or direct FPV propwash torque coefficients.
